name: Chan Meditation Center
description: The Chan Meditation Center in Elmhurst, Queens, New York, was founded by Master Sheng Yen in 1979 and serves as the US headquarters of the Dharma Drum Mountain tradition. The center offers meditation retreats, dharma classes, and Chan practice. Master Sheng Yen was one of the most prominent Chinese Buddhist teachers in the West, known for his integration of Chan practice with modern life.
